So if the bundle that the person is purchasing is one that is already pre-programmed. So if the combination is already in here you do not need to submit the coupon code. So these are meant to be by far the thing that you push. It's the one where they get the best deal and I programmed these so that you could get someone on recurring or sell large packages with those whereas if you have a one off bundle that you're going to use the discount code which I'll get to in a second, you would not have the options of doing any of the sexier stuff like subscribe and save three, six or 12 month packages. So if the package you're selling is one of the packages that is pre-programmed, you will have all of these options at your disposal and you will not need to use the coupon code. So that is what this would be. Now let's go and make a purchase of three items for example. So let me empty my cart real quick so we don't get confused. We're going to do EFA, they want to get that guy and then they want to get multi and then they want to get test storm. So let me see if I got all these in there. So now they have four in there. Now you'll notice that it's going to always subtract the least expensive item from the list. It was the $37 product was the one that was subtracted because it's the least expensive of them. If you had four $67 items then $67 would have been subtracted from it. The downside of the packages or bundles that are not pre-programmed is that you can't do subscribe and save with it and you can't do a three six or twelve month package. For that reason we're continually updating these to try and reflect the ones that are most likely to be used. So if someone is like I don't want that, I just want all these things then you can sell that to them and you can give them the discount, they just won't be able to go and subscribe and save. So it's important that if you can try and push them towards the items that are pre-programmed or the bundles that are pre-programmed so that you can have all of these more lucrative money making options at your disposal.
